item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the notion that societal needs always justify limiting individual rights.

notes: Both agents end opposed to the statement. Agent A begins with a balanced rights-coexistence objection, then moves into a stronger anti-restriction position after Agent B raises public health and safety exceptions. Agent B also shifts from a balanced temporary-limits frame toward Agent A's accountability and non-negotiable-rights framing by the final turn.
